## Summary

Describe the change and the runtime boundary it affects.

## Tests

List the verification commands you ran and the result.

## Security and Governance

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tenant data, private traces, or customer data are included.
- [ ] Tenant isolation is preserved.
- [ ] New side effects are policy-gated.
- [ ] New schemas are backward compatible or include migration notes.
- [ ] New runtime paths emit useful telemetry.

## Release Notes

State whether this change needs release notes, migration notes, or no public release note.
